name: Stapleton Farmers' Market

Products.value: Colorado-grown produce, baked goods, specialty meats, gourmet food items and more

Address.value: South Green, 7601 East 29th Avenue, Denver, CO 80238

notes: On-file website coloradofreshmarkets.com is WRONG for this market — that site belongs to Cherry Creek Fresh Market, an unrelated operator. The Stapleton neighborhood was rebranded 'Central Park' in 2020; the old Stapleton Farmers' Market at Founders Green (29th & Roslyn) is now officially the 'Central Park Farmers Market', run by the nonprofit Central Park MCA (mca80238.com) with vendor management by Jarman and Co. Official site: mca80238.com/programs/signature-events/summer-markets. The market site/venue is now called 'South Green' (7601 E 29th Ave), essentially the same location at 29th & Roslyn cited in the source record. Season dates given (June 21 - Oct 11) are for the 2026 season per the official page; treated as recurring June-October months. Found candidate Facebook (facebook.com/centralparkfarmersmarketcolorado) and Instagram (@centralparkfarmersmarket) accounts via search with matching names, but could not fetch/verify their content directly, so they were omitted per the no-guessing rule. No SNAP/EBT, email, ADA, or certified-organic info found on official sources.
